title: Principal Software Engineer (Generative AI, Agentic AI, ML models)
company_focus: Global business consulting and technology solutions provider
description:
Company Description

Zillion Technologies Inc. - (ZTI) is a global business
consulting and technology solutions provider. Zillion
delivers innovative business solutions that give clients a
competitive edge.

Job Description

Job Title: Principal Software Engineer

Location: Chennai/Bangalore/Hyderabad/Pune/ Fully Remote

Qualifications

• 10+ years of experience in building highly scalable
software systems/platforms.

- Strong proficiency in building software systems in the cloud
  and/or docker. Building Software in the cloud.
- Experience building elegant technical architectures that
  solve complex customer problems.
- Experience in one or more areas (minimum 1 or 2 skills):
  Generative AI architectures, AI Agents, ML models.
- Strong hands-on experience in one or more object oriented
  programming languages, preferably Python.
- Solid experience in API development (cloud: api gateway;
  serverless lambdas; container service) and API lifecycle
  management.
- Strong expertise in data persistence using SQL databases (eg
  postgres), NoSQL databases (eg dynamodb), SQL and others.
- Proven ability to mentor team members in designing,
  developing, debugging complex software stacks and to
  develop their technical capabilities.
- Experience with the full software lifecycle in highly agile
  and ambiguous environments
- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
- Ability to support/resolve production customer escalations
  with excellent debugging and problem solving skills.

Preferred Skills:

- Strong expertise in architecting and building scalable,
  cloud native software products, using cloud APIs, in one
  or more public clouds, preferably GCP, utilizing
  serverless, SQL and NoSQL databases, observability,
  messaging (pub/sub), API services, 0049AM, OAuth, OCR,
  Cloud storage (s3) and more.

Additional Information

Thanks & Regards,

Praveen Kumar,

Sr. Recruiter

Zillion Technologies Inc

E-mail: praveen(at)zilliontechnologies(dot)com

Phone: 571-814-3745
responsibilities: Build highly scalable software systems and platforms in cloud environments
Architect and implement Generative AI solutions, AI Agents, and ML models
Design elegant technical architectures to solve complex customer problems
Develop and manage APIs using cloud API gateways, serverless lambdas, and container services
Implement data persistence solutions using SQL and NoSQL databases
Mentor team members in designing, developing, and debugging complex software stacks
Support and resolve production customer escalations with debugging and problem-solving
Manage full software lifecycle in agile environments
use_cases: Generative AI system development and deployment
Machine learning model integration into software platforms
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role requires experience in Generative AI architectures,
AI Agents, and ML models. As a Principal Software Engineer,
this position involves building and architecting AI systems
directly, not just supporting infrastructure for AI teams.
The focus on Generative AI and AI Agents indicates hands-on
work with AI/LLM technologies.
